mapper.select: SELECT w.wiki_page_id, w.project_id, w.parent_page_id, w.title, w.current_version, w.user_code, w.created_at, w.update_at, u.user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM wiki_pages w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.user_code = u.user_code WHERE w.project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY w.created_at ASC

SELECT w.wiki_page_id, w.project_id, w.parent_page_id, w.title, w.content, w.current_version, w.user_code, w.lock_user_code, w.locked_at, w.created_at, w.update_at, u.user_name, u.email AS user_email FROM wiki_pages w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.user_code = u.user_code WHERE w.wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'WP-' || TO_CHAR(wiki_page_id_seq.NEXTVAL) FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO wiki_pages ( wiki_page_id, project_id, parent_page_id, title, content, current_version, user_code, created_at, update_at ) VALUES ( #{wikiPageId}, #{projectId}, #{parentPageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{title}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, 1, #{userCode}, SYSDATE, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT h.wiki_history_id, h.wiki_page_id, h.wiki_version, h.title, h.user_code, h.created_at, u.user_name FROM wiki_histories h LEFT JOIN users u ON h.user_code = u.user_code WHERE h.wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId} ORDER BY h.wiki_version DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE wiki_pages SET lock_user_code = #{userCode}, locked_at = SYSDATE WHERE wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId} AND (lock_user_code IS NULL OR lock_user_code = #{userCode})
mapper.select: SELECT w.wiki_page_id, w.lock_user_code, w.locked_at, u.user_name AS lock_user_name FROM wiki_pages w LEFT JOIN users u ON w.lock_user_code = u.user_code WHERE w.wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId}

SELECT r.wiki_relation_id, r.wiki_page_id, r.target_type, r.project_id, r.target_task_id, r.target_wiki_id, CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'TASK' THEN t.task_title WHEN r.target_type = 'WIKI' THEN wt.title ELSE NULL END AS target_title, CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'TASK' THEN '/project/task/detail/' || r.target_task_id || '?projectId=' || r.project_id WHEN r.target_type = 'WIKI' THEN '/project/wiki?projectId=' || r.project_id || '&wikiPageId=' || r.target_wiki_id ELSE NULL END AS target_url FROM wiki_relations r LEFT JOIN task t ON r.target_type = 'TASK' AND r.target_task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN wiki_pages wt ON r.target_type = 'WIKI' AND r.target_wiki_id = wt.wiki_page_id WHERE r.wiki_page_id = #{wikiPageId} ORDER BY r.wiki_relation_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wiki_relations ( wiki_relation_id, wiki_page_id, target_type, project_id, target_task_id, target_wiki_id ) VALUES ( wiki_relation_id_seq.NEXTVAL, #{wikiPageId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{projectId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{targetTaskId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{targetWikiId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT NULL AS wiki_relation_id, NULL AS wiki_page_id, 'TASK' AS target_type, #{projectId} AS project_id, t.task_id AS target_task_id, NULL AS target_wiki_id, t.task_title AS target_title, '/project/task/detail/' || t.task_id || '?projectId=' || #{projectId} AS target_url FROM task t WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND t.task_title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' AND (t.deleted_yn IS NULL OR t.deleted_yn = 'N') ORDER BY t.task_id

SELECT NULL AS wiki_relation_id, NULL AS wiki_page_id, 'WIKI' AS target_type, #{projectId} AS project_id, NULL AS target_task_id, w.wiki_page_id AS target_wiki_id, w.title AS target_title, '/project/wiki?projectId=' || #{projectId} || '&wikiPageId=' || w.wiki_page_id AS target_url FROM wiki_pages w WHERE w.project_id = #{projectId} AND w.title LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY w.created_at
